Title: User initiates Flash activity
Test Steps: 1. User triggers Flash activity
Expected Result: Flash activity is initiated and control passes to U-environment

Title: User registers in the system
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to register activity
2. User fills in registration form with valid details
3. User submits registration form
Expected Result: Registration is successful, and control returns to U-environment

Title: User registration fails with invalid data
Test Data: Invalid user details (empty fields, incorrect email format)
Test Steps: 1. User attempts to register with invalid details
Expected Result: Registration fails, and an error message is displayed

Title: User logs into the system
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to login activity
2. User enters valid login credentials
3. User submits login form
Expected Result: Login is successful, and control returns to U-environment

Title: User login fails with invalid credentials
Test Data: Invalid login credentials (wrong password, non-existent user)
Test Steps: 1. User attempts to log in with invalid credentials
Expected Result: Login fails, and an error message is displayed

Title: User subscribes to newsletter
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to newsletter activity
2. User subscribes to the newsletter
Expected Result: Subscription is successful, and control returns to U-environment

Title: User unsubscribes from newsletter
Preconditions: User is subscribed to the newsletter
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to newsletter activity
2. User unsubscribes from the newsletter
Expected Result: Unsubscription is successful, and control returns to U-environment

Title: User creates an event
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to create event activity
2. User fills in event details
3. User submits event creation form
Expected Result: Event is created successfully, and control returns to U-environment

Title: User creates an event with invalid details
Preconditions: User navigates to create event activity
Test Data: Invalid event details (empty fields, future dates)
Test Steps: 1. User attempts to create an event with invalid details
Expected Result: Event creation fails, and an error message is displayed

Title: User joins or views an event
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to join/view event activity
2. User selects an event to join or view
Expected Result: User can join or view the selected event, and control returns to U-environment

Title: User cannot join a full event
Test Steps: 1. User attempts to join a full event
Expected Result: User receives a message indicating the event is full

Title: User accesses their profile
Test Steps: 1. User navigates to profile activity
Expected Result: User's profile information is displayed

Title: User updates their profile information
Test Steps: 1. User updates their profile information
Expected Result: Profile information is updated successfully

Title: User exits the system
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to exit activity
2. User confirms exit
Expected Result: User is logged out, and control returns to U-environment

Title: Database interaction during event creation
Test Steps: 1. Event creation triggers database interaction
Expected Result: Event details are stored in the database

Title: Notification center sends event creation confirmation
Test Steps: 1. Event creation triggers notification center
Expected Result: User receives a confirmation notification

Title: Notification center sends event update
Test Steps: 1. Event update triggers notification center
Expected Result: User receives an update notification

Title: Notification center sends subscription confirmation
Test Steps: 1. Subscription triggers notification center
Expected Result: User receives a subscription confirmation notification

Title: Notification center sends unsubscription confirmation
Test Steps: 1. Unsubscription triggers notification center
Expected Result: User receives an unsubscription confirmation notification

Title: Notification center sends event cancellation notification
Test Steps: 1. Event cancellation triggers notification center
Expected Result: User receives a cancellation notification

Title: Notification center sends event reminder
Test Steps: 1. Upcoming event triggers notification center
Expected Result: User receives a reminder notification

Title: Notification center sends event update notification
Test Steps: 1. Event update triggers notification center
Expected Result: User receives an update notification

Title: Notification center sends event registration confirmation
Test Steps: 1. Event registration triggers notification center
Expected Result: User receives a registration confirmation notification

Title: Notification center sends event registration rejection
Preconditions: User attempts to register for a full event
Test Steps: 1. Registration attempt for a full event triggers notification center
Expected Result: User receives a rejection notification

Title: Notification center sends event registration update
Test Steps: 1. Registration status change triggers notification center
Expected Result: User receives an update notification

Title: Notification center sends event cancellation update
Test Steps: 1. Event cancellation triggers notification center
Expected Result: User receives a cancellation update notification

Title: Notification center sends event reminder update

Expected Result: User receives a reminder update notification
